Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Mondrian Entered the Public Domain. The Estate Disagrees 26 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Neocaml – Rubocop Creator's New OCaml Mode for Emacs 21 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Microgpt explained interactively 277 upvotes, 39 comments
  4. Decision trees – the unreasonable power of nested decision rules 492 upvotes, 77 comments
  5. Computer-generated dream world: Virtual reality for a 286 processor 111 upvotes, 15 comments
  6. Show HN: Timber – Ollama for classical ML models, 336x faster than Python 134 upvotes, 27 comments
  7. Right-sizes LLM models to your system's RAM, CPU, and GPU 156 upvotes, 34 comments
  8. Everett shuts down Flock camera network after judge rules footage public record 258 upvotes, 66 comments
  9. Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS Foundation 622 upvotes, 229 comments
  10. Show HN: Omni – Open-source workplace search and chat, built on Postgres 38 upvotes, 8 comments
  11. An interactive intro to Elliptic Curve Cryptography 40 upvotes, 9 comments
  12. Ghostty – Terminal Emulator 749 upvotes, 318 comments
  13. Making Video Games in 2025 (without an engine) 151 upvotes, 57 comments
  14. Next-gen spacecraft are overwhelming communication networks 70 upvotes, 24 comments
  15. How to record and retrieve anything you've ever had to look up twice 70 upvotes, 26 comments
  16. Tove Jansson's criticized illustrations of The Hobbit (2023) 179 upvotes, 86 comments
  17. WebMCP is available for early preview 301 upvotes, 170 comments
  18. Little Free Library 124 upvotes, 65 comments
  19. When does MCP make sense vs CLI? 386 upvotes, 246 comments
  20. /e/OS is a complete "deGoogled", mobile ecosystem 112 upvotes, 66 comments
  21. Enable CORS for Your Blog 41 upvotes, 20 comments
  22. Jolla phone – a full-stack European alternative 33 upvotes, 17 comments
  23. Process-Based Concurrency: Why Beam and OTP Keep Being Right 44 upvotes, 27 comments
  24. Why does C have the best file API 121 upvotes, 94 comments
  25. If AI writes code, should the session be part of the commit? 274 upvotes, 252 comments
  26. Ask HN: How are you all staying sane? 39 upvotes, 29 comments
  27. Evolving descriptive text of mental content from human brain activity 24 upvotes, 17 comments
  28. Setting up phones is a nightmare 167 upvotes, 202 comments
  29. Long Range E-Bike (2021) 171 upvotes, 264 comments
